en.name: Crocodile
en.effectText: [On Play] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card is a {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type card, draw 2 cards and place 1 card from your hand at the top of your deck.
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea

jp.name: クロコダイル
jp.effectText: 【登場時】自分のデッキの上から1枚を公開し、そのカードが特徴《王下七武海》を持つ場合、カード2枚を引き、自分の手札1枚をデッキの上に置く。

definition.name: Crocodile
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
definition.text: [On Play] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card is a {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type card, draw 2 cards and place 1 card from your hand at the top of your deck.

en.name: Trafalgar Law
en.effectText: [On Play] You may return 1 of your Characters to the owner's hand: If your Leader has the {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type, return up to 1 Character with a cost of 4 or less to the owner's hand.
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea

jp.name: トラファルガー・ロー
jp.effectText: 【登場時】自分のキャラ1枚を持ち主の手札に戻すことができる：自分のリーダーが特徴《王下七武海》を持つ場合、コスト4以下のキャラ1枚までを、持ち主の手札に戻す。

definition.name: Trafalgar Law
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
definition.text: [On Play] You may return 1 of your Characters to the owner's hand: If your Leader has the {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type, return up to 1 Character with a cost of 4 or less to the owner's hand.

en.name: Buggy
en.effectText: [On Play] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and place them at the top of your deck in any order.
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea

jp.name: バギー
jp.effectText: 【登場時】自分のデッキの上から3枚を見て、好きな順番に並び替え、デッキの上に置く。

definition.name: Buggy
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
definition.text: [On Play] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and place them at the top of your deck in any order.

en.name: Boa Hancock
en.effectText: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On Play] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and place them at the top or bottom of your deck in any order. Then, give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type Leader or Character cards.
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea

jp.name: ボア・ハンコック
jp.effectText: 【ブロッカー】(相手のアタックの後、このカードをレストにし、アタックの対象をこのカードにできる)【登場時】自分のデッキの上から3枚を見て、好きな順番に並び替え、デッキの上か下に置く。その後、自分の特徴《王下七武海》を持つ、リーダーかキャラ1枚にレストのドン‼1枚までを、付与する。

definition.name: Boa Hancock
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
definition.text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On Play] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and place them at the top or bottom of your deck in any order. Then, give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type Leader or Character cards.

en.name: Marshall.D.Teach
en.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may place 1 card from your hand at the top of your deck: Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea

jp.name: マーシャル・D・ティーチ
jp.effectText: 【起動メイン】【ターン1回】自分の手札1枚をデッキの上に置くことができる：自分のリーダーかキャラ1枚にレストのドン‼2枚までを、付与する。

definition.name: Marshall.D.Teach
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
definition.text: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may place 1 card from your hand at the top of your deck: Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.
